summary_text: Top predictors of views_public: excitement_peaks (r=-0.65), wpm (r=-0.60), avg_segment_duration_s (r=-0.35). Top predictors of retention_30s: shareability_score (r=-0.46), last_peak_position (r=-0.45), ms_emotional_intensity_max_scale_var (r=+0.38). Top predictors of engagement_like_ratio: excitement_peaks (r=+0.59), ms_llm_escalation_across_loops (r=-0.49), ms_vocab_richness_mean_scale_var (r=-0.27). Top predictors of engagement_comment_ratio: ms_emotional_intensity_mean_scale_var (r=+0.32), ms_emotional_intensity_max_scale_var (r=+0.31), ms_topic_coherence_scale_var (r=-0.25). Top predictors of engagement_overall_ratio: ms_llm_escalation_across_loops (r=-0.51), ms_llm_loop_completeness (r=-0.42), ms_vocab_richness_mean_scale_var (r=-0.24). Top predictors of outlier_potential: ms_llm_boundary_quality (r=+0.56), loop_quality_score (r=+0.48). Top predictors of outlier_spike_score: pitch_mean (r=+0.61), ms_llm_boundary_quality (r=+0.61), loop_quality_score (r=+0.56). Top predictors of outlier_retention_score: pitch_mean (r=-0.58), peak_count (r=-0.32), peaks_per_minute (r=-0.28). Top predictors of ret_baseline: shareability_score (r=-0.57), ms_llm_loop_completeness (r=-0.45), payoff_satisfaction_score (r=-0.38). Top predictors of ret_30s: silence_ratio_audio (r=-0.55), shareability_score (r=-0.52), ms_llm_loop_completeness (r=-0.50). LASSO-stable for ret_30s: ms_llm_boundary_quality. Top predictors of ret_spike_count: ms_llm_loop_completeness (r=+0.54), ms_llm_boundary_quality (r=+0.48), genz_score (r=-0.28). LASSO-stable for ret_spike_count: ms_llm_boundary_quality. Top predictors of ret_max_spike: genz_score (r=-0.35), ms_word_density_argmax_scale (r=+0.35), laughter_marker_count (r=-0.32). Top predictors of ret_stability: pitch_mean (r=-0.62), peak_intensity_max (r=+0.30). Top predictors of ret_end_ratio: character_depth_score (r=-0.38), ms_sentiment_range_argmax_scale (r=+0.32), ms_word_density_argmax_scale (r=+0.29).
